nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: URTICA DIOICA LEAF/TUSSILAGO FARFARA LEAF/EQUISETUM ARVENSE STEM/ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS LEAF/SALVIA OFFICINALIS LEAF/ACHILLEA MILLEFOLIUM FLOWER/MENYANTHES TRIFOLIATA LEAF/BETULA ALBA LEAF EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: This is the extract of the leaves of Urtica dioica, Tussilago farfara, Rosmarinus officinalis, Salvia officinalis, Menyanthes trifoliata, Betula alba, the stems of Equisetum arvense, and the flowers of Achillea millefolium
